title: Amazon Neptune Graph Element
description: Represents graph elements (vertices, edges, and their properties) as stored and returned by Neptune property graph queries via Gremlin and openCypher.

Vertex.title: Vertex (Node)
Vertex.description: A vertex (node) in the Neptune property graph. Vertices have a unique ID, one or more labels, and zero or more key-value properties.

~id.description: The unique identifier of the vertex.

~entityType.description: The entity type (always 'node' for vertices in openCypher format).

~labels.description: The labels assigned to the vertex.

~properties.description: The vertex properties as key-value pairs. Values can be strings, numbers, booleans, or dates.

Edge.title: Edge (Relationship)
Edge.description: An edge (relationship) in the Neptune property graph. Edges connect two vertices and have a unique ID, a type (label), source and target vertices, and zero or more properties.

~id.description: The unique identifier of the edge.

~entityType.description: The entity type (always 'relationship' for edges in openCypher format).

~start.description: The ID of the source (start) vertex.

~end.description: The ID of the target (end) vertex.

~properties.description: The edge properties as key-value pairs.

PropertyValue.title: Property Value
PropertyValue.description: A typed property value as returned in Neptune stream records.

value.description: The actual value of the property.

dataType.description: The Neptune data type of the value.

GremlinVertex.title: Gremlin Vertex
GremlinVertex.description: A vertex as returned by Gremlin valueMap or elementMap traversals.

id.description: The unique identifier of the vertex.

properties.description: The vertex properties. In Gremlin, property values are arrays to support multi-valued properties.

GremlinEdge.title: Gremlin Edge
GremlinEdge.description: An edge as returned by Gremlin valueMap or elementMap traversals.

id.description: The unique identifier of the edge.

inV.description: The ID of the incoming (target) vertex.

inVLabel.description: The label of the incoming vertex.

outV.description: The ID of the outgoing (source) vertex.

outVLabel.description: The label of the outgoing vertex.
